coverage_groups.name: alu_operations
coverage_groups.description: Cover all ALU operation types via both I-type (0x13) and R-type (0x33) paths
coverage_groups.constraint: ADD, SUB, XOR via register (0x33), ADDI, XORI via immediate (0x13), plus LUI, AUIPC, FENCE

coverage_groups.name: branch_instructions
coverage_groups.description: Cover all 6 branch types (BEQ, BNE, BLT, BGE, BLTU, BGEU) with taken/not-taken paths
coverage_groups.constraint: each funct3 value (0,1,4,5,6,7) must be exercised with both taken and not-taken outcomes

coverage_groups.name: jump_instructions
coverage_groups.description: Cover JAL, JALR with call/return/branch semantics
coverage_groups.constraint: JAL sets is_jmp, JALR with rd!=0 sets is_call, JALR with rs1=x1/ra sets is_ret

coverage_groups.name: memory_access
coverage_groups.description: Cover load and store address computation via ALU ADD
coverage_groups.constraint: load (opcode 0x03) and store (opcode 0x23) must both compute address via alu ADD

coverage_groups.name: trap_handling
coverage_groups.description: Cover invalid instruction, ECALL, and EBREAK trap generation
coverage_groups.constraint: each trap source must produce branch_request=1, source=TRAP, branch_d_request=1

coverage_groups.name: pipeline_control
coverage_groups.description: Cover hold stall and no-valid-instruction paths
coverage_groups.constraint: hold_i must preserve outputs, no opcode_valid must zero all outputs

coverage_model.branch_condition_coverage: each branch comparison (eq, ne, lt, ge, ltu, geu) with true and false operands
coverage_model.alu_submodule_coverage: riscv_alu submodule must be invoked for ADD (load/store), I-type ALU, and R-type ALU operations
coverage_model.immediate_coverage: all 5 immediate types (I, S, B, U, J) must be correctly sign-extended
coverage_model.trap_coverage: invalid, ECALL, EBREAK must produce correct trap outputs (branch_request, source=TRAP)
